title: German Potato Panke
description: A crispy German potato pancake recipe, perfect for a hearty snack or lunch option. Serve with your favorite toppings.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a bowl, mix together grated potatoes, crumble, onions, salt, and pepper.
Beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
Add the eggs to the potato mixture and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil.
Using a ladle, pour the potato mixture into the pan and flatten slightly.
Cook for about 4-5 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the panke and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until golden brown on the other side.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
